attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-HAEMAT-03-00206 — SEQ is provisional (derived from source AMS-006); ingest --reseq will assign the real globally-unique sequence within the SPEC-HAEMAT-03 bucket.

Primary specialty for the id set to HAEMAT (the underlying benign autoimmune neutropenia). The acute driver is a mental-health / somatic-anxiety presentation, so specialty_tags also carries MH; maintainer to confirm the preferred primary specialty tag.
Age (48) inferred with NO source signal — the note gives no age; conservative adult value used, please confirm on clinician review.
Sex at birth (female) inferred with NO source signal — the note gives no sex; please confirm on clinician review.
Difficulty tier set to red_herring_laden: alarming subjective symptoms and a scary pathology alert are red herrings mimicking acute neutropenic sepsis / leukaemia over a benign chronic trait.

diagnosis_category set to important_not_to_miss: the actual diagnosis is benign, but the case's clinical value is the pair of time-critical mimics (febrile neutropenia, acute leukaemia) that must be screened and safety-netted.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person consult with a full physical examination (chest auscultation, lymph-node palpation, skin inspection) and clinician-measured vitals. Clinician-only findings (no lymphadenopathy/organomegaly, exam-based vitals, ANC 1.0-1.5, positive anti-neutrophil antibodies) are sealed in 10/11; patient-obtainable data (wearable HR, elicited home-thermometer temperature) are reprojected to 01/02.

Baseline tier set to T1 (routine GP within 7 days) with conservative T4 red-flag escalation — reflecting true acuity (afebrile, well, benign chronic trait) rather than the telephone-triage 'urgent' framing in the source note, which reflected the need to prevent an inappropriate ED self-presentation, not intrinsic emergency acuity.

SNOMED CT-AU / ICD-10-AM codes are unverified candidates pending a terminology receipt; no dose was synthesised (management is reassurance + non-pharmacological, with antibiotics and a benzodiazepine encoded as not-indicated errors of commission).

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
